themes.exampleQuote: Line will be long but moves quickly.
Best ice cream in the burgh, thick and creamy, always delicious and they never miss.
Shout out to the friendly and professional staff!
They gave me WAY too much ice cream, the price was RIDICULOUSLY affordable.
They have so many choices of desserts, and it can be a challenge to make a decision on what to order.
I had coconut soft serve dipped in a cherry shell and it was incredible — you could really taste the homemade coconut.

sentiment_summary: Reviewers rave about Page's thick, homemade-quality ice cream and outsize portions at affordable prices, with the long lines being the only consistent friction — softened by the fact that the line moves fast.
notable_quote: I'm very serious about ice cream and Page's lives up to the hype!
